meta.title: Fonda — Hotel operations, on autopilot
meta.description: Fonda gives independent hotel GMs a morning AI briefing, an AI email assistant, check-in time chasing, and natural-language hotel queries.

hero.badge: AI for boutique hotels · Private beta
hero.subhead: An AI operations layer that handles the daily grind — morning briefings, OTA emails, check-in chasing, and live hotel data — in 90 seconds.

briefing.name: Morning AI briefing
briefing.description: A daily summary of arrivals, departures, VIPs, and anything that needs your attention — ready before your first coffee.

email-assistant.name: AI email assistant
email-assistant.description: Draft and triage guest emails in your hotel's voice, so the front desk spends less time in the inbox.

checkin-chasing.name: Check-in time chasing
checkin-chasing.description: Automatically nudge guests for their expected arrival time and keep housekeeping one step ahead.

hotel-chat.name: Hotel query chat
hotel-chat.description: Ask anything about your hotel in plain language — occupancy, revenue, who's arriving late — and get an instant answer.

briefingPreview.greeting: Good morning. Here's your hotel today.
briefingPreview.row1rest: 3 haven't shared arrival times — chased automatically.
briefingPreview.row2rest: Drafts are ready for your review.

stats.headline: Quiet mornings, measurable hours.
stats.lead: Fonda pays for itself in reclaimed time — here's what independent hotels get back once the daily busywork runs itself.
stats.onboardingLabel: your team starts the same day

cta.headline: Ready to get your mornings back?
cta.subhead: Free for the first 20 hotels. No credit card. Works the same day.

auth.loginDesc: Sign in to your Fonda dashboard.
auth.signupDesc: Start running your hotel on autopilot.

onboarding.title: Set up your hotel
onboarding.desc: A few details so Fonda can tailor briefings and sync your PMS.

home.noBriefing: Your morning briefing hasn't been generated yet today. Open it to generate a fresh summary of arrivals, emails, and rate alerts.
home.occupancyNote: Occupancy is computed from synced reservations. Rate-plan pricing isn't connected yet.

emails.title: Emails
emails.needAttentionBannerOne: {count} email needs your personal attention — no AI draft was generated.
emails.needAttentionBannerOther: {count} emails need your personal attention — no AI draft was generated.
emails.needsAttentionNote: This email needs your personal attention — write a reply below.
emails.confirmBulkOne: Send {count} standard reply (arrival info & general inquiries)?
emails.confirmBulkOther: Send {count} standard replies (arrival info & general inquiries)?

checkin.title: Check-in chasing
checkin.desc: Arrival-time requests for confirmed guests arriving in the next 7 days.
checkin.noChasers: No pending chasers. Use “Generate now” to draft requests for guests arriving in the next 7 days.

askYourHotel.label: Ask your hotel
askYourHotel.title: Ask your hotel
askYourHotel.subtitle: Answers from your live data
askYourHotel.empty: Ask me anything about today's operations — arrivals, VIPs, occupancy, or your inbox.
askYourHotel.draftCreated: Draft created → View in Email inbox
askYourHotel.suggestion2: Do I have any VIP guests this week?
askYourHotel.suggestion3: Which dates have low occupancy in the next 14 days?
askYourHotel.suggestion4: Any guests missing an arrival time?
askYourHotel.suggestion5: How many emails need my attention?

settings.title: Settings
settings.desc: Connect {hotel}'s property management system so Fonda can sync reservations and guests.
settings.gmailConnected: Connected to {email}. We found {count} emails from the last 7 days — drafts will be prepared for your review.
settings.hotelDetailsDesc: Your hotel's name and room count. Room count drives occupancy across briefings and the dashboard.
settings.mewsDesc: Paste the Client and Access tokens from your MEWS integration. We verify them with MEWS, then store them encrypted at rest.
settings.apaleoDesc: Connect your Apaleo account with OAuth. You'll be sent to Apaleo to grant Fonda read access; we store only an encrypted refresh token.
settings.apaleoConnected: Fonda is connected to your Apaleo account.
settings.gmailDesc: Connect the hotel inbox so Fonda can classify guest emails and draft replies for your review. We request read and send access and store only an encrypted refresh token.
settings.briefingDesc: When and how Fonda prepares your daily briefing.

apaleoStatus.invalid_state: The connection link expired or was invalid. Please try again.
apaleoStatus.misconfigured: Apaleo isn't configured on the server (missing client ID).
apaleoStatus.no_hotel: No hotel associated with this user.

gmailStatus.invalid_state: The connection link expired or was invalid. Please try again.
gmailStatus.misconfigured: Gmail isn't configured on the server (missing Google client ID).
gmailStatus.no_hotel: No hotel associated with this user.

admin.title: Admin · Sync
admin.desc: Raw view of the last PMS sync for {hotel}.

legal.englishNotice: Our legal documents are provided in English.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.body: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again, and we've been notified if it keeps happening.
error.dashboardBody: Something went wrong fetching your hotel data — this can happen if the PMS or email connection is temporarily unavailable.
